---
title: "Topic B — Practice Session: Hands-on exercises"
date: "2026-10-20"
author: "Prof. Jane Smith"
organization: "My University"
institute: "Institute of Something"
email: "jane.smith@university.edu"
course: "My Course"
term: "WS 2026"
lang: "en"
format:
  html:
    argdown:
      mode: web-component
      sourceHighlighter: web-component
      config: ../../argdown.config.json
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    toc: false
    include-in-header: ../../assets/latex/_handout-packages.tex
    template-partials:
      - ../../assets/latex/before-body.tex
    syntax-definitions:
      - ../../assets/pandoc/argdown.xml
    syntax-highlighting: ../../assets/pandoc/argdown.theme
filters:
  - ../../node_modules/.bin/argdown-filter
argdown:
  mode: inline
  format: svg
  config: ../../argdown.config.json
reference-section-title: "References"
---

## Learning Objectives


- Solve applied problems using the methods from Topic A
- Reflect on limitations and open questions


## Content

TODO: Add handout content.

## Exercises

TODO: Add exercises.
